description: Guard against false personality-patterns routing (guard-situational-grief): description uses category-adjacent vocabulary but is actually depression territory. classify should recommend depression and leave outOfScope null.

expectedQualities.notes: False-positive guard: description uses personality-patterns-adjacent language but is actually depression territory. Should recommend depression path, NOT route to outOfScope.

payload.intakeText: I'm coming out of a long relationship that ended badly and I'm having a hard time. I don't trust people right now. I'm sad all the time. I don't know who I am without her. This isn't how I usually am — I'm normally pretty grounded.
